heading: Can Atlas be used with AWS Transit Gateway?
body:
Yes. AWS (Amazon Web Services) PrivateLink powers Atlas Private Endpoints. This allows
for transitive connectivity. You can use the
[AWS Transit Gateway](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/tgw/tgw-getting-started.html)
with your VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) if you connected your VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) to Atlas via AWS (Amazon Web Services)
PrivateLink.
